note: Phase 1c stone hub stack, deployed to Base Sepolia as the proving deployment for the GL→hub deliverDirect path (chain-agnostic, same path the live Tokenpost verdict loop uses). ZKsync Era Sepolia remains the spec's canonical hub, pending the zksolc toolchain.

VerdictStoneBridgeReceiver.note: Dispatch-on-receive (direct-path only; endpoint zero). Decodes the envelope and calls hub.processBridgeMessage.

pending.genlayerSource: set hub.setGenlayerSource(<VerdictStone IC>) after the GenLayer deploy
pending.authorizedRelayer: set receiver.setAuthorizedRelayer(<relay wallet>, true) — the Tokenpost relay wallet
pending.relayBranch: add a stone-target branch to supabase/functions/relay/index.ts that deliverDirects to this receiver
pending.bridgeReuse: reuses Tokenpost's deployed GenLayer BridgeSender/BridgeReceiver ICs + relayer (safe: relay skips non-claim targets)
